prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "3. Legal Proceedings" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 4. Mine Safety Disclosures".
First locate where Item 3 stops on this page:
- If the "Item 4" heading is visible on this page, Item 3 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Ignore ALL text below that heading; it belongs to the next section, not Item 3.
- The target section may have started on a previous page and may leave only a short carryover at the very TOP of this page.
- If the next-section heading appears near the top, the answer may be only the few lines immediately above that heading.
- Only if no later section heading appears on this page should you use the bottom of the page as Item 3's ending.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 3 right before the section ends. The answer must come only from Item 3, even if the next section occupies most of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Information with respect to this item may be found in Note 9 Commitments and Contingencies in the accompanying notes to our consolidated
financial statements included in Part II, Item 8, “Financial Statements and Supplementary Data” of this Annual Report on Form 10-K, under the
caption “Legal Proceedings” which information is incorporated herein by reference.
